source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open Gringotts, the VaultBank online banking app at http://localhost:3001 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Go to Zelle, send money to a brand-new recipient (not an existing contact) named Wendy Calloway with email wendy.calloway@example.com, for exactly $246.81, with the memo 'Studio rental deposit', then confirm and submit the payment.
